generated_comment: Arre bhai, kabhi kabhi bas hormones ka scene hota hai. Us time zyada logic lagane ka fayda nahi, thoda chup raho aur chai de do, 2 din mein mood theek ho jayega. Main mazaak nahi kar raha, aadhi ladaai toh isi chakkar mein hoti hai.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it attributes a woman's bad mood to hormones and suggests her reactions are not rational or worth engaging with. It encodes the surface manifestation of dismissing women's emotions as hormonal and biologically determined.
original_frame: Misogyny Jokes: Period, Hormones and Mood.
persona_text: You are Sanjay. Age 37. A man in a middle class colony in Delhi. You are sitting with four male neighbours on plastic chairs outside after dinner. One neighbour is complaining that his wife has been in a terrible mood all week. You are responding with your own theory about why women get this way and what the men in the group should do about it.
